name: Build & Push Docker

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Docker Login
      run: echo "${{ secrets.DOCKER_PASS }}" | docker login -u "${{ secrets.DOCKER_USER }}" --password-stdin

    - name: Build Image
      run: docker build -t ${{ secrets.DOCKER_USER }}/argo-nginx-demo:latest ./app

    - name: Push Image
      run: docker push ${{ secrets.DOCKER_USER }}/argo-nginx-demo:latest
